Item Name: LeafLea 160 Hibiscus Tea Bags, Hibiscus Flower Tea Bags, Promotes Heart Wellness & Lowers Blood Pressure, 100% Natural Hibiscus Herbal Tea, Caffeine-Free, Gluten-Free, Sugar-Free (Pack of 4)
Bullet Point 1: HOLISTIC HEALTH SUPPORT – Packed with nutrients and vitamin C, LeafLea Hibiscus Tea promotes heart health and helps lower blood pressure naturally. Each cup delivers a healthy dose of vitamin C, supporting overall wellness.
Bullet Point 2: PURE & SUPERIOR – Our Fresh hibiscus flowers are from Vietnam, the leading producer and exporter of high-quality Hibiscus flowers. Vietnam’s tropical climate and fertile soil provide optimal conditions for the growth of hibiscus flowers, ensuring a rich flavor and vibrant color in the tea.
Bullet Point 3: NATURAL GOODNESS – Made with 100% pure hibiscus, free from caffeine, sugar, gluten, and artificial additives. Enjoy a revitalizing and clean tea that promotes hydration and supports detoxification.
Bullet Point 4: OPTIMAL INFUSION DESIGN – LeafLea tea bags are designed for convenience, with double chambers ensuring every cup has a deep, rich flavor. Perfect for daily use, whether at home or in the office.
Bullet Point 5: EASY BREWING – For a vibrant tea experience, simply steep in hot water for 5-6 minutes. Adjust the flavor to your preference by adding honey or fresh lemon for a delightful, naturally sweet taste.
Product Description: Discover the vibrant and refreshing world of LeafLea Hibiscus Tea with our Pack of 4, where each sip is a celebration of flavor and wellness. Crafted from 100% natural hibiscus flowers sourced from the fertile lands of Vietnam, our tea embodies the highest standards of purity and quality. Each tea bag is a promise of our commitment to your health, free from pesticides, herbicides, and artificial additives, making it a guilt-free choice for your daily routine. Enjoy the delightful, tangy taste of hibiscus tea that’s not only a treat for your palate but also a powerhouse of health benefits. Rich in vitamin C, LeafLea Hibiscus Tea helps bolster your immune system and supports heart and hair health. Its detoxifying properties may assist in managing digestive health and blood sugar levels, making it an excellent companion for those pursuing a healthy lifestyle. Versatile and easy to brew, our hibiscus tea can be savored hot for a cozy experience or chilled for a refreshing iced tea treat. Simply steep one of our double-chambered tea bags in boiling water for 5-6 minutes to unlock the full flavor and aroma. Customize your cup with a touch of honey or sugar if desired, or enjoy it unsweetened for a naturally bold experience. Each pack is elegantly presented in a luxurious box, ensuring that your tea arrives in pristine condition, perfect for gifting or indulging in a moment of self-care. Our individually wrapped tea bags offer convenience without compromising on quality, allowing you to enjoy a fresh brew anytime, anywhere. Indulge in the exquisite taste and health-boosting properties of LeafLea Hibiscus Tea today. With our Pack of 4, you’ll always have a flavorful option on hand that supports your wellness journey. Join countless satisfied customers and elevate your tea experience with LeafLea’s premium hibiscus tea bags!
Value: 160.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium-priced herbal tea positioned as a health-focused, natural wellness product with strong functional benefits (heart wellness, blood pressure support). The 'Pack of 4' bundle structure suggests a value proposition for frequent consumers, while the Vietnamese-origin hibiscus and double-chamber tea bag design imply higher quality and convenience. Elegant packaging and claims of purity (free from pesticides, herbicides, and artificial additives) reinforce a premium, health-conscious brand tier.
